ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for city information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the weather data pertains to */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness percentage */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather data entry */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility distance */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country (ISO format) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* General climate type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the weather conditions */,
  "temperature_trend" TEXT /* Trend in temperature */,
  "precipitation_trend" TEXT /* Trend in precipitation */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Dominant wind direction */,
  "air_quality_trend" TEXT /* Trend in air quality */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Country where the city is located
Last update timestamp for city information
Unique identifier for each weather data entry
Reference to the city the weather data pertains to
Date and time of the weather data entry
Last update timestamp for weather data
Unique code for each country (ISO format)
Unique identifier for each weather report
Reference to the city the report is based on
